user_goal: B026 Synthetic Data Banner — 在 workbench Layer 0 期间所有 protected 页面顶部加持久 banner，明确但克制地标注 'Research prototype · Synthetic data only · Not for investment decisions / 研究原型 · 仅含合成数据 · 不构成投资决策依据'，防止用户误把 synthetic 数字当作真实投资依据。Stream 0 / Phase 0 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第一个 batch，独立可立即做无前置依赖)。本批次 2 features：(F001) SyntheticDataBanner 组件 + protected layout 集成 + 新 namespace syntheticBanner.{headline,ariaClose} 双语 messages + env flag NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER 控制 + 本会话隐藏 reload 重现 + vitest ≥6 + Playwright ≥4 双 locale；(F002) Codex L1+L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff + framework 候选记录。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.28：** AI 5 子条 + 系统层 + UI 层 + 数据 CI 层 + 产品边界。决策矩阵（2026-05-25 用户已批）：本会话隐藏可关闭性 / env var 手动控制 Layer 状态 / 明确但克制文案语气 / 浅黄背景 + Info 图标 / 仅 protected 路径 / 双语继承 B024 i18n。Phase 1 Real Data done 阶段 by acceptance 修改 .env.production NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false 让 banner 自然下线。F001 generator，F002 codex。预估 1 个轻量批次（参考 Phase 0 lead-in 定位）。
evaluator_feedback: 2026-05-26 B026 F002 reverify completed on HEAD `c9274b5ba18146e132de5a5061556d020af73066`. Generator's clean-env hypothesis was correct for the previous local failures: after `rm -rf .next node_modules && npm ci`, local `npm run build` recovered, anonymous `/login` recovered, and Playwright recovered to `38 passed`. L1 is now PASS: backend pytest 241 passed 2 skipped / ruff / mypy green; trade pytest 727 / mypy green; frontend lint / typecheck / vitest 165 / build / npm audit green; artifact grep clean; Playwright inventory 38 and execution 38 passed. L2 production locale smoke is mostly green and `/api/debug/recent-errors` returns `200 {"count":0,"records":[]}`, but the batch still FAILS because the banner dismiss interaction is broken on production: clicking `data-testid="synthetic-data-banner-close"` does not hide the visible banner in the current page/session. The banner remains visible immediately after click, then remains visible after reload. Acceptance requires 'hide now, reappear on reload'; production currently only satisfies the reload half. Report: docs/test-reports/B026-synthetic-data-banner-reverify-blocker-2026-05-26.md. Status must return to fixing; signoff blocked.
generator_handoff: B026 F001 fix-round 2 (commit d02ad79) — banner dismiss now has redundant DOM-fallback path so user-visible 'hide now' contract holds even if React synthetic-event propagation is interrupted on production. Codex reverify L2 confirmed L1 is fully green after clean env; only the dismiss interaction in production fails (click → no visual hide, even though spec works in every other environment: vitest, local next dev, local next start, GitHub Actions CI). Change: SyntheticDataBanner.tsx now (a) keeps React onClick → setDismissed(true) → return null as canonical path, (b) adds useEffect-bound vanilla addEventListener on the close button that also calls setDismissed AND sets container.style.display = 'none' via ref. Either path independently satisfies 'hide now'. Reload still re-renders SSR HTML so 'reappear on reload' is preserved. Unit test +1 spec (dispatching native MouseEvent, asserting unmount OR display:none — total 9 specs / vitest 166 passed). Codex's 4 L2 screenshots committed to docs/screenshots/B026-banner/{zh-CN,en}/ as on-disk evidence of pre-fix state. Local prod-mode Playwright b026 spec 6/6 passed against the new build. Lint=0, typecheck=0, build green, npm audit no-high, safety regression unchanged. Codex F002 reverify needed: (1) wait for Workbench Deploy auto-trigger after Frontend CI on d02ad79, (2) confirm production HEAD == main HEAD == d02ad79 via /api/health.version, (3) repeat the L2 dismiss probe on production /strategies — banner must hide on click and reappear on reload, (4) full signoff per spec §5 F002 + framework/templates/signoff-report.md.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-25 B026 启动（implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 Phase 0 第一个 batch，独立可立即做）。(1) 用户在 B025 done 阶段完成 5 份产品规划 docs + implementation-path 接续地图 + framework v0.9.28 沉淀（结构澄清 + AI 边界精细化 5 子条）。用户说'按路线依次安排批次'，按 harness 状态机一次一批次启动 B026。(2) 用户确认 3 关键决策：本会话隐藏可关闭性（点 × 后会话级 React state 隐藏 / reload 后重现）/ env var 手动控制 Layer 状态（NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER，Phase 1 done 时手动改 false）/ 明确但克制文案语气（'研究原型 · 仅含合成数据 · 不构成投资决策依据' / 'Research prototype · Synthetic data only · Not for investment decisions'，浅黄背景 + Info 图标，不走红色 WARNING）。(3) Spec 落地 docs/specs/B026-synthetic-data-banner-spec.md 含 11 章节，引用 implementation-path §4 §7 §8 §9 / positioning §1.1 §6.1 / user-personas §7 §8 / B024 §4 i18n / framework/STRUCTURE.md / planner.md AI 边界 / generator.md §15 / templates/signoff-report.md（v0.9.27 §Post-signoff Deploy）。(4) features.json + progress.json 同步更新；backlog.json 不动（B026-B043 序列在 implementation-path 中固化，不入 backlog；backlog 仅保留 BL-XXX 风格的 signoff soft-watch 条目）。(5) status: done → building（混合批次：F001 generator + F002 codex，跳过 new/planning 直接 building）。(6) 下一会话 Generator (默认映射 Claude CLI，无 .agent-id) 起 F001：SyntheticDataBanner 组件 + protected layout 集成 + 新 namespace 双语 messages + vitest ≥6 + Playwright ≥4。关键注意点：① 不动 B024 既有 16 namespace 仅新增 1 个 syntheticBanner.*；② Layout 集成只入 (protected) 不入 root / login；③ env flag check at component level (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER !== 'false' 默认 true)；④ Dismiss state local React state，不入 cookie / localStorage（本会话隐藏 reload 重现）；⑤ Playwright 双 locale × 5 protected 路由抽样 ≥3 / dismiss reload 重现；⑥ 中文按钮禁词 vitest grep 0 命中（新 banner 文案不含禁词）；⑦ Backend 不动 既有 pytest ≥320 不破；⑧ Phase 1 done by acceptance 修改 .env.production 隐藏 banner 是后续 batch 责任不在本批次。(7) 后续路径按 implementation-path §4 顺序：B027 (S1.A 数据源选型 + B009 snapshot 增强) → B028 (S1.B 价格 backfill) → B029 (S1.C 财务 SEC EDGAR) → B030 (S1.D 全 sleeve 切真) → 里程碑 A Layer 0→1。
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-26 F001 fix-round 2（commit d02ad79）— 给 dismiss 加 vanilla DOM fallback 确保生产『hide now』。Codex reverify 在干净 env 复测后 L1 全绿（与 fix-round 1 假设一致：之前的本地 build/Playwright 红是 stale .next 污染，不是产品回归），但 L2 在生产真实交互发现 click → no visual hide。我本地多环境验证（vitest 165、next dev Playwright、next start production-mode Playwright、GitHub Actions Frontend CI on c9274b5）全部能 dismiss，唯独生产 VM 复现红；无法远程调试 → 改用『双路径并行』防御性修复。变更：SyntheticDataBanner.tsx 保留 React onClick → setDismissed(true) → return null 为主路径；新增 useEffect 把 vanilla addEventListener 绑到 close 按钮，handler 也调 setDismissed AND 通过 containerRef 直接 container.style.display='none'。任一路径独立满足『hide now』；React 主路径如成功，DOM 路径无害（component 已 unmount）；React 路径若被生产某种 event-delegation/hydration 边角中断，DOM 路径仍能视觉收起。reload 仍重渲 SSR HTML 维持『reappear on reload』。tests/unit/synthetic-data-banner.spec.tsx +1 spec（用 dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent) 绕开 RTL React-synthetic fireEvent，断言 unmount OR display:none —— 用户可见契约 OK 即过），总 9 specs。也把 Codex 4 张 L2 screenshots（docs/screenshots/B026-banner/{zh-CN,en}/{home,reports,strategies}.png）一并入 commit 作磁盘证据。本地 gates 全绿：vitest 166 passed（157 baseline + 9 = 166，spec ≥162 floor ✓）/ lint=0 / typecheck=0 / clean build OK / npm audit no-high / safety no-execution-buttons 15/15 unchanged / artifact grep clean。本地 prod-mode（npm run start）Playwright b026 spec 6/6 passed in 4.0s。状态推 reverifying；待 Workbench Deploy 自动触发 d02ad79 后 Codex 在 production 复测 dismiss 交互 + 完成 signoff。
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-26 B026 F002 reverify on HEAD `c9274b5` proved the first-round L1 failure was local environment pollution, not a product regression. After a clean reset (`rm -rf .next node_modules && npm ci`), frontend `npm run build` passed, `/login` no longer returned `Internal Server Error`, focused banner Playwright passed, and full Playwright recovered to `38 passed`. L1 is therefore green end-to-end: backend pytest 241 passed 2 skipped + ruff + mypy, trade pytest 727 + mypy, frontend lint + typecheck + vitest 165 + build + npm audit, artifact grep clean, and full Playwright green. L2 then exposed the real remaining defect on production. Read-only locale surfaces for zh-CN and en were healthy, `/api/debug/recent-errors` returned `200 {"count":0,"records":[]}`, and production `/api/health.version` matched local HEAD `c9274b5...`. However, clicking `data-testid="synthetic-data-banner-close"` on production does not hide the banner in the current page/session: before click count=1 visible=true, after click count=1 visible=true, after reload count=1 visible=true. Acceptance requires immediate hide plus reload reappearance, so the batch remains blocked in `fixing`. Wrote blocker report `docs/test-reports/B026-synthetic-data-banner-reverify-blocker-2026-05-26.md`; do not sign off.
